steps.title: Spot the causal trigger
steps.content: The sentence immediately following the underlined portion states “the reductions inspired an air-cooling device,” establishing a direct link between the observation and the practical application that follows.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: Choice C correctly identifies the observation as central to the text's practical application discussion. The other three either misplace the observation's temporal role, conflate it with supporting an earlier claim, or reverse the cause-and-effect relationship. That matches choice C — C is correct.
